name: JEPA Leader-Stack + Storage-Only Int6 Export
blurb: Leader-stack SP-1024 submission with a learned JEPA auxiliary loss (weight 0.10), validated first in a clean JEPA-vs-control isolation lane and then translated into the stronger March 23 stack. Final artifact uses a storage-only post-training int6 export pass from the saved checkpoint to land under 16 MB. Seed 1337 complete; seeds 42 and 2026 pending.
author: simonw
